mnemonics: The Human-Centred AI Project Has 5 Core Phases: PHASE - Problem, Human, Analysis, Solution, Evaluation
keyPoints: Define a clear problem with a specific user group in mind.
Conduct rigorous user research and involve stakeholders throughout the process.
Prototype, test, and iteratively refine your solution based on feedback.
commonMistakes: Focusing on the AI technology first instead of starting with the human need.
Skipping user testing or evaluation due to time constraints.
Designing for a generic 'user' instead of a well-defined, specific audience.
